mapper.insert: INSERT INTO correction_request (user_id, application_case_id, correction_type, source_type, source_ref_id, original_text, improved_text, result_json, status, ai_usage_log_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{correctionType}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{originalText}, #{improvedText}, #{resultJson}, #{status}, #{aiUsageLogId})
